common.site_description: Peer-reviewed open-access journal on AI in education

seo.site_keywords: AI in education,learning analytics,intelligent tutoring,generative AI,open access,Artificial Intelligence for Education,AI4E
seo.site_publisher: Association of Global Intelligent Science and Technology

sidebar.indexed_articles_hint: Aggregated from the issue-level article counts returned by the live archive.

article.title: Article Title
article.full_text_hint: Open the article online or download the PDF for deeper reading.
article.citation_hint: Citation text is generated from the current live metadata. Use final publication metadata when available.
article.citation_export_hint: Export the current citation as Text, BibTeX, RIS, or RefWorks tagged data.
article.citation_help_text: Plain text citation for quick copy into emails, pages, or general documents.
article.citation_help_bib: BibTeX format for LaTeX, Zotero, JabRef, and similar reference tools.
article.citation_help_ris: RIS format for EndNote, NoteExpress, Zotero, and other compatible managers.
article.citation_help_refworks: RefWorks tagged format. Copy the tagged data or send it directly to RefWorks.
article.search_results_hint: Search the live article index by title, keyword, or author.
article.search_results_for_keyword: Showing live search results for keyword "{keyword}".
article.search_results_for_author: Showing live search results for author "{author}".
article.search_load_failed: Search results could not be loaded
article.search_load_failed_hint: Please verify the article service is available, then try again.
article.search_empty_hint: Try another keyword, author, or a broader search phrase.
article.detail_load_failed: Article details could not be loaded
article.detail_load_failed_hint: Please verify the article exists and the backend service is available.
article.invalid_id_hint: Please open the article from a valid link or search result.
article.authors_empty: No author information is available for this article.
article.keywords_empty: No keywords are available for this article.
article.submit_hint: Submit a new article through the live backend interface. You can also upload the PDF after creation.
article.submit_auth_hint: Submitting an article requires an authenticated account.
article.submit_forbidden_hint: Only administrator accounts can submit manuscripts after sign-in. Other roles are not allowed to submit.
article.submit_failed: Article submission failed. Please verify the backend service and your login state.
article.search_sort_hint: The current endpoint returns page-level results, so the page can be re-ordered locally by date or views.
article.sort_description: Change the display order within the current result page to scan more efficiently.

home.welcome_title: Welcome to Artificial Intelligence for Education
home.welcome_subtitle: Explore the latest academic research and promote academic exchange and knowledge dissemination
home.hierarchy_description: This site follows a clear hierarchy: journal → volume → issue → article. Volumes usually map to a year, each volume contains several issues, and each issue contains the articles.
home.hierarchy_volume_hint: The current volume belongs to the {year} archive
home.hierarchy_article_hint: Number of articles currently listed in this issue
home.current_issue_focus_hint: You are entering the table of contents for the current issue, which contains {count}.
home.latest_articles_hint: Highlights the most recently indexed content so readers can quickly follow the current stream.
home.popular_articles_hint: Surfaces content with stronger recent reading and download attention.
home.archive_spotlight_hint: Jump into the archive by year and use the current issue as a starting point for structured reading.
home.resource_hint: Author discovery, archive browsing, article search, and site overview are organized as first-class site entry points.
home.resource_submission_hint: Review preparation, metadata requirements, and manuscript upload steps.
home.resource_author_hint: Browse authors and jump directly into related article search results.
home.resource_news_hint: Track site upgrades, API transitions, and information architecture changes.
home.resource_apf_hint: Review the acceptance-stage fee policy and budget planning guidance.

archive.title: Journal Archive
archive.subtitle: Browse all journal articles by year and volume/issue
archive.hierarchy_heading: Archive browsing moves from year to volume to issue
archive.hierarchy_description: Start with a year, then inspect the volumes in that year, expand a volume to see its issues, and finally open the articles inside an issue.
archive.current_issue_summary: Open the current issue or jump into the archive by year, volume, and table of contents.
archive.current_issue_pending: The latest issue snapshot is currently displayed.
archive.search_placeholder: Search volume, issue, or publication date
archive.current_only_hint: Only keep the current issue in the archive results.
archive.partial_data_notice: Some archive requests failed. The page is displaying the live data that was loaded successfully.
archive.load_failed: Archive data could not be loaded
archive.load_failed_hint: Please verify the backend service is available, then refresh and try again.
archive.no_issues_hint: Try clearing filters or broadening the search range.
archive.issue_detail_failed: Issue contents could not be loaded right now.
archive.volumes_and_issues_lead: AI4E is organized in a clear volume-to-issue hierarchy so readers can locate each issue under its parent volume at a glance.
archive.index_live_summary: This page shows {volumes} volumes and {issues} issues from the live archive, with each issue linking to its table of contents.

author.title: Author Information
author.name: Name
author.directory_hint: Browse the live author index and jump directly into each author's article results.
author.login_required: Login is required to load authors
author.login_required_hint: The author endpoint currently requires authentication. Please sign in and try again.
author.list_load_failed: Author list could not be loaded
author.list_load_failed_hint: Please verify the author service is available, then refresh and try again.

user.login_description: Please enter your account and password
user.login_failed: Login failed. Please check your username and password.
user.login_required_hint: Please sign in to load your live profile information.
user.profile_hint: Your profile information is loaded directly from the authentication service.

about.overview_heading: Rebuild the journal site around live data and author services
about.overview_description: The About area is no longer a placeholder hub. It now explains the journal, indexes the public-facing sections, and helps readers and authors understand how to use the platform.
about.sections_heading: Expose the major site sections as first-class destinations
about.sections_description: The author directory, archive browsing, and article search are presented with a consistent structure and a clearer hierarchy.
about.mission_heading: Reorganize the site around clarity, discoverability, and academic tone
about.mission_description: The redesign follows the design document's academic styling, information hierarchy, and responsive reading flow while preserving the live API integrations.
about.quick_access_heading: Move directly into reading or site services
about.quick_access_description: If the goal is already clear, jump from here into the archive, search flow, or author directory.
about.card_submission: Preparation notes, metadata requirements, and submission flow.
about.card_authors: Author discovery with direct navigation into article results.
about.card_news: Platform updates, implementation progress, and service notes.
about.card_links: External academic tools and useful service links.
about.card_apf: Acceptance-stage fee policy and communication guidance.
about.pillar_professional_desc: Article, issue, author, and citation data are presented with stronger structure.
about.pillar_open_desc: Readers can move from the home page, archive, search, and detail pages without dead ends.
about.pillar_author_desc: Author discovery, archive access, and account services are unified as a coherent service layer.

issue.title: Journal Issue
issue.issue_toc_description: Table of contents for this issue ({count} articles).

footer.runtime_note: Content is rendered from live APIs and the current site structure.

admin.title: Admin
admin.sync_submissions_description: The admin Bearer session is still sent automatically, but the submission token required in the request body must be entered manually.
admin.sync_submissions_token_hint: Fill in the token required by the request body. It will not be auto-filled from the current login token.
admin.sync_submissions_year_hint: Only accepted submissions from this year will be pulled.
admin.sync_submissions_year_invalid: Acceptance year must be between 1900 and 3000.
admin.journal_settings_hint: Manage the public journal profile, cover image, publishing metadata, metrics, and ISSN.
admin.pdf_upload_after_create_hint: Optional. After the article is saved, the PDF is sent to the upload API so readers can view and download full text.
admin.pdf_status_uploaded: A PDF is already uploaded for this article.
admin.pdf_status_missing: No PDF is currently stored for this article.
admin.page_order_index_hint: Smaller numbers appear first and will be saved to the backend order_index field.
admin.author_add_new_hint: If no existing author matches your search, create one here and auto-select it for this article.
admin.cover_image_field_hint: Upload image files through /api/v1/uploads/document and store the returned URL into cover_image.
admin.cover_image_url_placeholder: The uploaded URL will be filled automatically
admin.journal_overview_hint: Long text field (overview). Leave empty to omit on save.
admin.journal_cover_image_field_hint: Upload the journal cover through /api/v1/journals/{id}/upload. The response returns the latest journal record.
admin.journal_publishing_mode_hint: Maps to the publishing_mode field in the journals API.
admin.journal_bilingual_edit_hint: Fill English first, then switch to 中文 for optional Chinese. Both are saved together; the site language switch shows the matching column only.
admin.article_type_hint: Regular article keeps the full metadata form. Document hides abstract, authors, keywords, and DOI.
admin.page_range_invalid: Page end must be greater than or equal to page start.
admin.article_issue_help: Optional. Sent as issue_id; matches the article issue relation in the API.
admin.delete_issue_confirm: Are you sure you want to delete "{title}"? This will also remove it from the database and cannot be undone.
admin.delete_article_confirm: Are you sure you want to delete "{title}"? This will also remove it from the database and cannot be undone.
admin.volume_issue_shortcuts_hint: Issues belong to a volume. Create a volume first, then add an issue with its number and metadata.
admin.volume_manage_hint: Create volumes and manage their published status. According to the current API contract, deleting a volume is not available.
admin.volume_delete_not_supported: The current backend API does not provide DELETE /volumes/{id}, so this page supports list/create/update only.
admin.volume_created: Volume created. You can add an issue next.
admin.login_description: This area is for administrators only. Sign in with an admin account.
admin.login_forbidden: This account is not an administrator.
admin.login_manual_enter: If nothing happens, tap here to open the article list
admin.change_password_description: Update the password for the currently signed-in administrator account. The current password is verified and the new password must match in both fields.
admin.password_min_length_hint: The new password must be at least 6 characters.
admin.password_mismatch: The two new password fields do not match.
admin.deploy_staging_description: Manually trigger the GitHub Actions workflow `deploy-staging.yml` from the admin area to redeploy the staging environment.
admin.deploy_staging_hint: The button calls the dedicated deploy service, and that service dispatches the workflow through the GitHub Actions API so the GitHub token never reaches the browser.
admin.deploy_staging_success: The staging deployment has been queued successfully.
admin.deploy_staging_confirm: Trigger {workflow} now? This will start a new staging deployment from ref {ref}.
admin.deploy_staging_missing_env: The deploy service is not configured yet. Please add these environment variables: {vars}
admin.deploy_staging_requirement_token: Set `DEPLOY_GITHUB_TOKEN` and make sure the token has Actions write permission for the target repository.
admin.deploy_staging_requirement_workflow: Keep `.github/workflows/deploy-staging.yml` on the default branch and make sure it includes `on: workflow_dispatch`.
admin.deploy_staging_last_trigger_hint: If GitHub returns workflow run details, the direct run link appears here. Otherwise, open the workflow page to inspect recent runs.
admin.preset_page_delete_no_record: No custom content saved for this page yet — nothing to delete. After you save edits once, you can delete here to restore the default site content.
admin.about_create_requires_title_content: When creating a page, Title and Content cannot be empty (API requirement). Fill them in to create the page; you can clear fields on the edit screen afterward if needed.
admin.about_create_requires_one_locale: Please enter at least a title or body in Chinese and/or English (English-only is fine).
admin.locale_translate_failed: Translation failed. For reliable, fast results, set NUXT_DEEPL_AUTH_KEY (DeepL API) or NUXT_GOOGLE_TRANSLATE_API_KEY on the server and restart. Without keys, only public free services are used and may fail. You can also type the other language manually.
admin.publishing_slug_conflict: This slug is reserved for a built-in publishing page
admin.about_storage_hint: Content is saved to the backend database and the public page reads the latest saved version.
admin.about_para_hint: Separate paragraphs with a blank line.
admin.custom_about_url_will_be: The page will be available at /about/{slug}
admin.custom_about_body_hint: Plain text or HTML is supported.
admin.richtext_attachment_inserted: The attachment link has been inserted into the editor.
admin.richtext_attachment_editor_unavailable: The editor is unavailable right now. Please try again.
admin.about_slug_static_conflict: This slug is reserved for a built-in about page
admin.authors_edit_hint: Search and click authors to add them; remove with ×. If the API only returns names, we try to match records in the author directory.
admin.keywords_edit_hint: Type a keyword and press Enter or Add; remove with × on the tag.
admin.keyword_input_placeholder: Type a keyword, then Enter or Add
admin.article_load_failed_hint: A 500 means the server crashed while reading this row—often bad or inconsistent data for this article only. Check backend logs and fix the record; other articles working usually confirms it is isolated to this one.
admin.edit_article_fallback_note: Detail API is unavailable; this form uses the list row cache (title and fields should still show). Add authors/keywords as needed, then save. You can dismiss this note.
admin.edit_optional_fields_hint: Legacy rows may omit these fields—leave blank and save, then fill in later.
admin.document_type_hidden_fields_hint: The current type is document, so abstract, authors, keywords, and DOI are hidden and cleared on save.
admin.keyword_update_skipped: (Keyword update not applied: backend returned relation-field error)
admin.abstract_latex_hint: The abstract supports plain text and LaTeX math. Use `$...$`, `$$...$$`, `\(...\)`, or `\[...\]`.
admin.abstract_preview_hint: Rendered live from the current abstract input.
admin.abstract_preview_empty: Start typing the abstract to see the rendered preview here.

share.description: Share the article with your team, institution, or research network.
